full_text:
Yu Gui 于圭
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yu Gui (于圭)was born in Taishan. Son of Yu Jin, he succeeded his father’s position. Yu Gui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
